name: Malkauns
description: Royal grandeur and youthful love; an aristocratic human lord holding court.

children.name: Dhanasri
children.description: A weeping woman painting a portrait of her absent lover to ease her sorrow.

musicalMutation.description: Flattens the 3rd and 6th notes heavily to evoke Karuna (compassion and longing).

children.name: Devagandhari
children.description: An ascetic woman practicing austerities in a ruined temple.

musicalMutation.description: Uses slow, heavy slides between notes to create a mystic atmosphere.

children.name: Gaundkari
children.description: A restless woman pacing a palace terrace under the winter moon.

children.name: Gandhari
children.description: A wandering female mendicant singing spiritual verses.

children.name: Seehute
children.description: A warrior woman holding a sword, waiting by a midnight fire.
